case_title: WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC et al VS. JASON L LANEY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PETITIONER WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-25-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITIONER WACHOVIA SECURITIES, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $279.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE MAY-06-2009, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER WACHOVIA SECURITIES LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LANEY, JASON L $352,867.02 PRINCIPAL, $112,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $128,220.92 INTEREST, $279.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $593,366.94, SEE SCANNED DOC (NO SASE, COPY IN 302 OUTBOX)
